title: CreateBetterFps
description: Improve your Create FPS when shaderpack is on, up to 50%
body:
This project can greatly improve your fps when using ShaderPacks playing Create6.0.

This project directly modifies the code of Create, and there is a plan to merge the optimized code to the official. If the code is merged, this project will be abandoned.

Fps improvement is archived by using sodium api and backface culling

**1.21.1 needs Sodium and Iris**

**1.20.1 needs Embeddium and Oculus**

Check my another fps mod Flerovium

Recommend with immediatelyfast

Shaderpack with 512 waterwheels

7fps->35fps
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/120598500012bb331cb5c2989d62fa53e02c4054.jpeg)
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a73d8344bfe1448cd21b5c38cdce22d4c5096691.jpeg)
